heading: Today
text: Clouds breaking for increasing periods of sun.  Mild, and a bit muggy.  Some localized showers or a thunderstorm, more numerous north, tapering off.  Highs in the 60s to near 70 in the St. Lawrence and northern NY, 70s for the rest of the north, and upper 70s to low 80s in southern valleys.  Winds south to southwest near 10 mph, gusting to 25 mph, shifting to the west late.

heading: Tonight
text: A stray evening shower north.  Periods of clouds give way to gradual clearing, last northeast.  Areas of dense fog, and cool.  Lows in the 50s, some upper 40s in the cool spots.  Winds northwest near 10 mph, gusting to 25 mph this evening, diminishing to light.

heading: Thursday
text: Patchy morning fog, then sunshine, mixed with some clouds.  Highs ranging through the 70s.  Winds light, becoming west to northwest near 10 mph.
